display.purpose: Operational metric values only. Never for headings or decorative numbers.

title.purpose: Section headings, modal titles, topbar label.

body.purpose: All data content and copy. Cap at 65ch for multi-line prose.

label.purpose: Column headers, badge text, category section dividers. Always uppercase.

mono.purpose: Machine IDs, version strings, command output, install scripts.

shadows.name: ambient-large
shadows.purpose: Sections, KPI cards, modals. Deep ambient grounding.

shadows.name: ambient-small
shadows.purpose: Lighter floating elements; available for tooltips and popovers.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default ease-out for UI state transitions (hover, focus, active).

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Button press feedback, badge state changes.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Single-column KPI grid, hide topbar right chips.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: Hide sidebar, show mobile brand header.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action trigger. One per view section. Gradient fill is the only gradient in the system.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"/><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/></svg>Add agent</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1); background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2563eb, #7c3aed); color: #e2eaf6; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(79,140,255,.25); transition: box-shadow 120ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } .ds-btn-primary svg { width: 13px; height: 13px; flex-shrink: 0; } @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine) { .ds-btn-primary:hover { box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(79,140,255,.35); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.18); } } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4f8cff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Default Button
components.description: Secondary actions. Understated surface fill; never competes with the primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-default { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #1e2d45; background: #132035; color: #e2eaf6; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine) { .ds-btn-default:hover { background: #0f1828; border-color: rgba(79,140,255,.4); } } .ds-btn-default:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-default:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4f8cff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive irreversible actions only: delete machine, reject agent. Never for warnings.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(248,113,113,.3); background: rgba(127,29,29,.7); color: #f87171; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 600; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine) { .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: rgba(127,29,29,.9); border-color: rgba(248,113,113,.5); } } .ds-btn-danger:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f87171; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-priority auxiliary actions in dense contexts. Transparent at rest.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid transparent; background: transparent; color: #94a3b8; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 600; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine) { .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,.04); border-color: #172338; } } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4f8cff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Badge: Online (ok)
components.description: Online agents, successful jobs, clean security posture. Paired with a pulsing status dot.
components.css: .ds-badge-ok { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 10.5px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .04em; white-space: nowrap; color: #34d399; background: rgba(52,211,153,.12); border: 1px solid rgba(52,211,153,.25); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-status-dot-online { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: #34d399; box-shadow: 0 0 6px #34d399; animation: ds-pulse 2s ease infinite; flex-shrink: 0; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } 50% { opacity: .6; transform: scale(0.9); } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-status-dot-online { animation: none; } }

components.name: Badge: Danger (CVE / failed)
components.description: CVE exposure, offline agents, failed jobs. High-attention signal; appears rarely.
components.css: .ds-badge-bad { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 10.5px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .04em; white-space: nowrap; color: #f87171; background: rgba(248,113,113,.12); border: 1px solid rgba(248,113,113,.25); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Badge: Warning (stale / reboot)
components.description: Stale check-in, reboot-pending state. Non-critical but requires attention.
components.css: .ds-badge-warn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 10.5px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .04em; white-space: nowrap; color: #fbbf24; background: rgba(251,191,36,.12); border: 1px solid rgba(251,191,36,.25); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Sidebar navigation item. Transparent at rest; subtle surface on hover. Icon at 75% opacity.
components.html: Machines12
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 9px; padding: 8px 10px; border-radius: 8px; color: #94a3b8; border: 1px solid transparent; text-decoration: none; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), opacity 120ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } .ds-nav-link svg { width: 15px; height: 15px; flex-shrink: 0; opacity: .75; transition: opacity 120ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } .ds-nav-link-label { flex: 1; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-nav-chip { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 999px; background: #132035; color: #94a3b8; border: 1px solid #172338; min-width: 22px; text-align: center; } .ds-nav-chip-ok { background: rgba(52,211,153,.12); color: #34d399; border-color: rgba(52,211,153,.25); } @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine) { .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #e2eaf6; background: rgba(255,255,255,.05); border-color: #172338; } .ds-nav-link:hover svg { opacity: 1; } } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4f8cff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Fleet filter. Icon-leading input; focus shifts border to Signal Blue with glow.
components.css: .ds-search-wrap { position: relative; max-width: 320px; } .ds-search-wrap svg { position: absolute; left: 10px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 14px; height: 14px; color: #566577; pointer-events: none; } .ds-search-input { width: 100%; background: #132035; border: 1px solid #172338; color: #e2eaf6; border-radius: 8px; padding: 7px 10px 7px 32px; outline: none; font-size: 13px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), box-shadow 120ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } .ds-search-input::placeholder { color: #566577; } .ds-search-input:focus { border-color: rgba(79,140,255,.6); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(79,140,255,.12); }

components.name: Section Container
components.description: The primary content grouping unit. Never nested. Header + optional filter bar + content body.
components.html:
Fleet inventory
Agent status, patch posture and lifecycle controls
12 agents
components.css: .ds-section { border: 1px solid #172338; border-radius: 16px; background: rgba(11,17,32,.9); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.45); overflow: hidden; } .ds-section-head { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; padding: 14px 18px; border-bottom: 1px solid #172338; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,.03) 0%, transparent 100%); } .ds-section-head-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .ds-section-icon { width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.05); border: 1px solid #172338; display: grid; place-items: center; color: #94a3b8; } .ds-section-icon svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; } .ds-section-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -.01em; color: #e2eaf6; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-section-sub { font-size: 12px; color: #566577; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-section-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; } .ds-badge-ok { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 10.5px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .04em; white-space: nowrap; color: #34d399; background: rgba(52,211,153,.12); border: 1px solid rgba(52,211,153,.25); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; }

narrative.overview:
PatchPilot's admin interface is not a dashboard. It is an instrument panel: every readout is where the operator expects it, every state is unambiguous, every action produces a predictable outcome. The visual language descends from aerospace and industrial control systems, not SaaS product design. Where a consumer product optimizes for first impressions, this interface optimizes for the 300th session.

The surface hierarchy is structural, not decorative. Void Navy at the base, four steps of rising brightness toward floating elements, ambient shadows for elements that genuinely float above the content plane. Nothing glows for atmosphere. Color communicates system state and nothing else.

This system explicitly rejects the shiny SaaS dashboard idiom: no gradient-accented metric heroes, no color deployed for energy rather than information, no glass cards used as atmosphere.
keyCharacteristics: Four-step dark surface stack from void canvas to floating elements
Six semantic accent colors, each strictly bound to one system state
Compressed typographic scale with extreme weight contrast (label at 10.5px/700 vs. metric at 30px/800)
Transitions only, no choreography, no decorative motion

rules.name: The State Color Rule
rules.body: Every accent color maps to exactly one system state. If you are adding a color that doesn't map to online/success, stale/warning, danger/CVE/failed, approval-pending, or action-in-flight, the element should use text-secondary or border-default instead.

rules.name: The No-Shine Rule
rules.body: Glow effects and radial gradient overlays in the current KPI cards are a legacy pattern. Do not extend them. New components use surface layering and borders for depth, not luminosity.

rules.name: The Weight-Talks Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is never achieved through color alone. Size and weight carry information hierarchy; color carries system state. Keep these responsibilities separated at all times.

rules.name: The Flat-at-Rest Rule
rules.body: Shadows appear only on components that sit at a raised or floating surface level. Table rows, badges, and inline labels carry no shadows.

rules.name: The One-Step Rule
rules.body: A component never jumps more than one surface step from its context. Never skip a step in the surface stack.

dos: Do use exact values for all data: full timestamps, integer counts, literal version strings.
Do bind each accent color to exactly one system state.
Do cap body-level prose at 65ch line length for any text longer than one line.
Do use monospace for all machine identifiers, OS version strings, kernel versions, command output, and install scripts.
Do implement prefers-reduced-motion: suppress the status-dot pulse animation and all transition-based motion.
Do gate hover state CSS behind @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine).
Do add transform: scale(0.97) on :active to every button variant.
Do use WCAG 2.1 AA contrast (4.5:1 minimum) for all text against its background.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient). Single solid color only.
Don't extend the KPI card glow/gradient overlay pattern to new components.
Don't add new border-left or border-right side-stripe accents greater than 1px.
Don't build shiny SaaS dashboards: no glowing card grids, no gradient-accented big-number heroes.
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively. Backdrop blur appears only in the sidebar and topbar.
Don't use color for decoration. If a color choice cannot be explained by answering 'what system state does this communicate,' it is wrong.
Don't animate keyboard-triggered or high-frequency actions.
Don't introduce a new accent color. The six-color state vocabulary is closed.
